scripts.build: npm run build --workspace @redline/core && npm run build --workspace @marketing-builds/desktop
scripts.typecheck: npm run typecheck --workspace @redline/core && npm run typecheck --workspace @marketing-builds/desktop
scripts.test: npm run test --workspace @redline/core && npm run test --workspace @marketing-builds/desktop
scripts.test:public: npm run test:public --workspace @redline/core && npm run test --workspace @marketing-builds/desktop
scripts.public:check: npm run privacy:scan -- --inventory docs/data-boundary-inventory.json --strict && npm run public:clean-clone
